reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar. El hotel muy lindo, limpio y una atención super cálida. El restaurante del hotel. Sin palabras, platos super abundantes y muy buenos precios. Un 10

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. The hotel is lovely, clean, and the service is incredibly warm. The hotel restaurant is simply amazing—the portions are incredibly generous and the prices are fantastic. A perfect 10!
